heading: Use of existing resources
label: 754 Use of existing resources
text: In establishing the national preparedness goal and national preparedness system, the Administrator shall use existing preparedness documents, planning tools, and guidelines to the extent practicable and consistent with this Act.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means title VI of , , , known as the Post-Katrina Emergency Management Reform Act of 2006. For complete classification of title VI to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–295120 Stat. 1394section 701 of this titleOct. 4, 2006
